campbell.title: Campbell City Council — September 2, 2025
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the city's finances for July 2025, including how money was invested and spent that month. The council also discussed plans to improve transportation options around Campbell, making it easier for residents to get around using different methods like buses, bikes, and cars.
keyTopics: July 2025 investment and spending report
Monthly treasurer's financial update
Campbell Multimodal Transportation Plan (improving transit options)

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council held a public meeting on March 18, 2026 where residents had a chance to speak about a new rule or policy. After hearing from the public, the council voted to fast-track an ordinance (a new city rule) by skipping the usual first reading process, and decided to vote on officially adopting it at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held - residents could provide feedback
New ordinance being pushed through on expedited timeline
Final vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
First reading requirement was waived to speed up the process

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — March 17, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on March 17, 2026, to approve routine meeting records, review the city's finances from January, and check progress on housing and general planning goals. The council also approved a new residential development project (Solana) and finalized community health and senior services plans for the year.
keyTopics: Solana Project development approved for Tract 10657
January 2026 city finances and investments reviewed
Progress update on General Plan and Housing Element goals
2026 Community Health and Senior Services work plan adopted
City council meeting procedures and minute-taking format modified

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 1, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting on April 1, 2026 to prepare upcoming agendas. They reviewed what items should be added to the April 7 meeting agenda, decided which items needed specific time slots, and checked if any documents needed special approval notices. They also looked ahead at the April 14 draft agenda to plan future meetings.
keyTopics: Finalized April 7, 2026 Council meeting agenda
Scheduled time slots for specific agenda items
Reviewed public records from March 19-26, 2026
Prepared draft agenda for April 14, 2026 meeting

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 2, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council's Human Relations Committee meeting scheduled for April 2, 2026 has been canceled. The committee will hold its next meeting on May 7, 2026.
keyTopics: Human Relations Committee meeting canceled
Next meeting rescheduled to May 7, 2026
No agenda items discussed at this session

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — March 25, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Housing and Human Services Commission met to review applications for federal grant money that helps fund affordable housing and community development projects in Sunnyvale. The commission approved previous meeting notes and heard presentations from organizations seeking funding to address housing and human services needs.
keyTopics: Federal grant funding available for affordable housing projects
Community development block grant (CDBG) applications being reviewed
Human services programs seeking financial support
Commission approval of February 2026 meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 6, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a meeting on April 6, 2026 where residents had the opportunity to speak about any topic for up to 3 minutes. The main business was electing a chair and vice chair for the Legislative Review Committee for 2026. There were no old business items to discuss.
keyTopics: Public comment period open to all residents (3 minutes per speaker)
Legislative Review Committee chair and vice chair elections for 2026
Legislative calendar review for 2026

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held an Audit Committee meeting to review a report on how Silicon Valley Power handles its electricity purchasing agreements. The meeting was available both in-person and online so residents could participate from home.
keyTopics: Review of Silicon Valley Power's electricity purchase agreement process
Hybrid meeting format (in-person and Zoom options for public participation)
City Auditor's Office findings and recommendations

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — March 17, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to discuss a new home security camera grant program to help residents protect their properties, review the city's spending plans for the next five years (2027-2031), and check the city's finances to make sure everything is on track. The council also approved previous meeting minutes and set the calendar for upcoming meetings.
keyTopics: Home security camera grant program - money to help residents buy security cameras
Five-year capital improvement plan - what roads, parks, and city buildings will be fixed or built from 2027-2031
Five-year financial forecast - making sure the city has enough money for its plans
Upcoming city council meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — March 31, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council reviewed and approved the gas utility's financial plan for 2027, which includes adjusting how much residents and businesses pay for natural gas service. The council also approved moving some money between accounts to keep the utility running smoothly.
keyTopics: Gas bill rate increases for residential and commercial customers
Financial forecast for the city's natural gas utility next year
Money transfers between the gas utility and general city budget
Approval of previous meeting minutes from the Utilities Advisory Commission
